articles.author: Meg Tirrell, Aaron Cooper, Jennifer Hansler, Ivana Kottasová
articles.title: US-bound flights with passengers who were in Ebola-affected region must land at Dulles airport for health screening - CNN
articles.description: US-bound flights carrying passengers who were recently in an Ebola-affected region of Africa must land at Dulles International Airport outside Washington, where they will undergo health screening.
articles.content:
Summary
  • The US is requiring all US-bound flights carrying passengers from Ebola-affected regions of Africa to land at Dulles International Airport for health screening.
